description.ko: 블랙홀 가장자리에 위치한 모놀리스 구조물을 묘사하며, 인디고색 중력파와 연보라색 성운으로 둘러싸인 신비로운 우주를 표현합니다.
description.en: A hauntingly beautiful depiction of a monolithic structure at the edge of a black hole, surrounded by indigo gravitational waves and lavender nebulae.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-high-definition shot of VOID-3, titled 'The Event Horizon Monolith.' A massive obsidian structure floats at the edge of a swirling accretion disk of #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo gravitational energy. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds form ghostly silhouettes drifting through the infinite #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Light from distant stars is stretched by gravitational lensing. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, volumetric lighting, capturing the silent majesty of the infinite universe.
